description_long: This is a sleek, modern business jet with a streamlined black fuselage accented by gold trim. The airplane features a low-wing configuration with slightly swept wings and two rear-mounted turbofan engines. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a series of rectangular windows running along the cabin. The tail section is equipped with a T-tail design, where the horizontal stabilizer sits atop the vertical fin. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it is likely retractable and integrated into the fuselage and wings. The overall appearance is that of a high-performance, executive-class jet designed for speed and luxury.
description: A black, gold-trimmed business jet with swept low wings, rear-mounted engines, and a T-tail. The design is streamlined and modern, with an enclosed forward cockpit and cabin windows.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, T-tail, and engine nacelles mounted near the rear fuselage.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the cockpit windows, cabin windows, swept low wing, and rear-mounted engines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the T-tail, twin engines, and the symmetry of the wings and tail surfaces.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, showing the opposite side of the fuselage, windows, and wing.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, moderately swept wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible, inferred from typical design and absence of fixed gear).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and rectangular side windows.
